query:
-- Alfalfa Hay: 0.500 → 0.750
UPDATE ration_plans SET qtyPerHeadPerDay = 0.750, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE id = 1;
-- Hay: stays 0.500 (already correct)
-- Concentrate 16%: 1.250 → 1.000
UPDATE ration_plans SET qtyPerHeadPerDay = 1.000, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE id = 3;

-- Verify
SELECT rp.id, ac.name as category, fi.name as feedItem, rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = rp.categoryId
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE ac.name = 'Fattening' AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY fi.name;

-- Verify
SELECT rp.id, ac.name as category, fi.name as feedItem, rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay

JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId

ORDER BY fi.name;
